title: WildClawBench: A Benchmark for Real-World, Long-Horizon Agent Evaluation
acquisition_purpose: Primary-source acquisition and post-v1 release audit for review-wildclawbench-harness-transport-validity.

paper.withdrawal_status: The immutable v1 abstract page contains a normal abstract and no withdrawal or retraction notice.
paper.extraction_status: Full immutable 38-page v1 PDF extracted successfully. The title/abstract, methods and harness claims, skills and failure-mode appendices, trajectory appendix, and final page were inspected for continuity.

official_repository.ownership_evidence: The immutable arXiv v1 paper links this repository as the released code.
official_repository.license: MIT as reported by the GitHub repository API at acquisition time; reviewers should verify the archived LICENSE for artifact-specific reuse.
official_repository.timing_boundary: The pinned repository commit and the documented ground-truth fix postdate arXiv v1 by roughly two months. They are official later release evidence, not the exact paper-time implementation.

official_dataset.snapshot_status: The complete 2,926-path API manifest plus revision-pinned README and eval.yaml were acquired. Exact-revision metadata for all five image archives and one safety-task fixture were fetched and hashed. The five opaque image archives total 56,633,714,841 bytes and were not downloaded, loaded, or executed; no runtime equivalence is inferred from metadata alone.

audit.scope: Complete immutable-v1 paper review plus static inspection of the pinned post-v1 source release, complete dataset manifest, exact image metadata, and one targeted fixture. No image/runtime execution and no empirical result reproduction.

claim_boundary: The evidence supports an inspectable current 60-task configured-system release and bounded descriptive paper findings. It does not establish paper-time code/image identity, exact empirical replay, adapter or trace equivalence, isolated harness causality, general model capability, broad safety, professional validity, production fitness, or readiness.
